title: ZENO 72 Dual Tip Markers Set with Case – No-Bleed Coloring for Adults - Fine & Brush Tip - Art Markers - Watercolor Pens for Artists, Coloring, and Journaling
features: 🟠 Vibrant 72-Color Marker Set with Dual Tips: Explore your creativity with ZENO’s 72 vibrant markers featuring dual tips: a 0.4mm fine tip for precise detailing and a 1-2mm brush tip for bold strokes. Ideal for adult coloring books, illustrations, journaling, and school projects.

🔵 No-Bleed Water-Based Ink: Say goodbye to page bleed-through! Our markers are made with premium water-based ink, ensuring smooth, vivid colors that stay where they’re applied. Safe, non-toxic, and perfect for coloring books, planners, and craft projects.

🟢 Premium Case: Designed for organization and portability, this set comes in a durable, sleek case with individual slots for each marker, keeping them neatly arranged and easy to carry for art on the go.

🔴 A Gift They’ll Love: The perfect gift for artists, students, and creative minds of all ages! Surprise your loved ones on their birthdays or any special occasion with a thoughtful and inspiring art set.

🟡 Great Quality and Value: At ZENO, we believe in providing premium-quality markers at a price that works for everyone. Enjoy vibrant colors and durable design equipment without compromising on affordability, offering excellent value for your creative journey.

🟣 Customer Support & 5-Year Protection: ZENO takes pride in providing 7-day-a-week customer service and 5-year product protection, ensuring your satisfaction and peace of mind with every purchase. Have a question? We’re here to help!
